paragraphs.text: Search and preview the entire Phosphor Glyph Forge collection — 412 hand-crafted duotone glyphs across twelve themed sets. Filter by category, tap any tile to inspect, copy raw SVG to clipboard.
A premium duotone SVG icon library forged for product, editorial, and brand work. Hand-crafted in twelve themed sets, free for personal use.
